id.desc_en: Identifier (UUID) of the previously posted task whose results you want to retrieve.
id.title_zh: 此前提交、要获取其结果的任务的标识（UUID）。

version.desc_en: Version of the DataForSEO API that produced this response, e.g. `0.1.20240101`. Handy for reproducibility and support tickets.
version.title_zh: 生成本次响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `0.1.20240101`，便于复现与提交工单。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole response. `20000` means the call succeeded; any other value signals a request-level failure (auth, quota, malformed payload) — see `status_message`.
status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的总体状态码。`20000` 表示调用成功；其它值表示请求级失败（鉴权、配额、报文格式等），详情见 `status_message`。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable text for `status_code`: `Ok.` on success, or the failure reason otherwise.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读文本，成功为 `Ok.`，否则为失败原因。

time.desc_en: Total server-side processing time for the response, as a duration string such as `0.1234 sec`.
time.title_zh: 服务端处理本次响应的总耗时，形如 `0.1234 sec` 的时长字符串。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this request in USD, aggregated over all tasks in the response.
cost.title_zh: 本次请求按美元计的总费用，为响应内全部任务费用之和。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的任务对象数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks that finished with an error; `0` means all tasks succeeded.

tasks[].result[].endpoint_regular.title_zh: 可直接调用的相对 URL，用于获取该任务的 regular（精简）结果。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.desc_en: Ready-to-call relative URL for fetching this task's advanced (full structured) results.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.title_zh: 可直接调用的相对 URL，用于获取该任务的 advanced（完整结构化）结果。

tasks[].result[].endpoint_html.desc_en: Ready-to-call relative URL for fetching this task's results as a raw HTML SERP page.
tasks[].result[].endpoint_html.title_zh: 可直接调用的相对 URL，用于获取该任务结果对应的原始 HTML SERP 页面。

url.desc_en: Direct Google search URL to parse instead of building the query from keyword/location/language parameters. Use one or the other.
url.title_zh: 直接给出要解析的 Google 搜索 URL，替代用 keyword/location/language 拼装查询；两种方式二选一。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name to target, e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`. Provide either `location_name`, `location_code` or `location_coordinate`.
location_name.title_zh: 要定位的完整地区名称，如 `London,England,United Kingdom`。`location_name`、`location_code`、`location_coordinate` 三者择一。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code to target; obtainable from the matching `.../locations` endpoint. Provide either `location_name`, `location_code` or `location_coordinate`.
location_code.title_zh: 要定位的数字位置码，可从对应的 `.../locations` 接口获取。与 `location_name`、`location_coordinate` 三者择一。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates to target, formatted as `latitude,longitude` (optionally with radius). Alternative to `location_name`/`location_code`.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 以 `纬度,经度`（可附半径）格式给出的 GPS 坐标定位，替代 `location_name`/`location_code`。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name to use, e.g. `English`. Provide either `language_name` or `language_code`.
language_name.title_zh: 要使用的完整语言名称，如 `English`。与 `language_code` 二选一。

language_code.desc_en: Language code to use, e.g. `en`; obtainable from the matching `.../languages` endpoint. Provide either `language_name` or `language_code`.
language_code.title_zh: 要使用的语言码，如 `en`，可从对应的 `.../languages` 接口获取。与 `language_name` 二选一。

device.desc_en: Device the SERP is emulated on, typically `desktop` or `mobile`.
device.title_zh: 模拟抓取 SERP 所用的设备类型，通常为 `desktop` 或 `mobile`。

os.desc_en: Operating system to emulate for the chosen device, e.g. `windows`, `macos`, `android`, `ios`.
os.title_zh: 为所选设备模拟的操作系统，如 `windows`、`macos`、`android`、`ios`。

se_domain.desc_en: Custom Google domain to query, e.g. `google.co.uk`, overriding the domain inferred from location.
se_domain.title_zh: 自定义要查询的 Google 域名，如 `google.co.uk`，覆盖由地区推断出的默认域名。

depth.desc_en: Number of SERP results to parse. Larger depth returns more results and may cost more.
depth.title_zh: 要解析的 SERP 结果条数。深度越大返回越多，费用也可能更高。

max_crawl_pages.desc_en: Maximum number of SERP pages to crawl for this query.
max_crawl_pages.title_zh: 本次查询最多抓取的 SERP 页面数。

search_param.desc_en: Additional raw Google search parameters appended to the query (e.g. URL query-string fragments).
search_param.title_zh: 追加到查询上的额外原生 Google 搜索参数（如 URL 查询串片段）。

load_async_ai_overview.desc_en: When true, additionally loads the asynchronously-rendered AI Overview block of the SERP.
load_async_ai_overview.title_zh: 为 true 时，额外加载 SERP 中异步渲染的 AI Overview 区块。

expand_ai_overview.desc_en: When true, expands the AI Overview item to capture its full expanded content.
expand_ai_overview.title_zh: 为 true 时，展开 AI Overview 条目以抓取其完整展开内容。

tag.desc_en: User-defined label stored with the task and echoed back in results, for your own correlation.
tag.title_zh: 随任务保存并在结果中回显的用户自定义标签，供你自行关联对账。

tasks[].result[].date_posted.desc_en: UTC timestamp of when the task was submitted, indicating result freshness.

tasks[].result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks[].result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks[].path.desc_en: API path segments identifying the endpoint this task was routed to; useful when debugging.
tasks[].path.title_zh: 标识该任务所走接口的 API 路径片段，排错时有用。

tasks[].data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters this task was created with, making the response self-describing about its inputs.

tasks[].result.desc_en: Result payload array for this task; element shape depends on the endpoint (SERP items, task references, locations, languages, etc.).
tasks[].result.title_zh: 该任务的结果数组，元素结构随接口而异（SERP 条目、任务引用、地区、语言等）。

keyword.desc_en: Search query string to run against Google.
keyword.title_zh: 要在 Google 上执行的查询关键词。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name to target, e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`. Provide either `location_name`, `location_code` or `location_coordinate`.
location_name.title_zh: 要定位的完整地区名称，如 `London,England,United Kingdom`。`location_name`、`location_code`、`location_coordinate` 三者择一。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code to target; obtainable from the matching `.../locations` endpoint. Provide either `location_name`, `location_code` or `location_coordinate`.
location_code.title_zh: 要定位的数字位置码，可从对应的 `.../locations` 接口获取。与 `location_name`、`location_coordinate` 三者择一。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates to target, formatted as `latitude,longitude` (optionally with radius). Alternative to `location_name`/`location_code`.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 以 `纬度,经度`（可附半径）格式给出的 GPS 坐标定位，替代 `location_name`/`location_code`。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name to use, e.g. `English`. Provide either `language_name` or `language_code`.
language_name.title_zh: 要使用的完整语言名称，如 `English`。与 `language_code` 二选一。

language_code.desc_en: Language code to use, e.g. `en`; obtainable from the matching `.../languages` endpoint. Provide either `language_name` or `language_code`.
language_code.title_zh: 要使用的语言码，如 `en`，可从对应的 `.../languages` 接口获取。与 `language_name` 二选一。

device.desc_en: Device the SERP is emulated on, typically `desktop` or `mobile`.
device.title_zh: 模拟抓取 SERP 所用的设备类型，通常为 `desktop` 或 `mobile`。

version.desc_en: Version of the DataForSEO API that produced this response, e.g. `0.1.20240101`. Handy for reproducibility and support tickets.

tasks[].status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task; `20000` means the task itself succeeded.

tasks[].status_message.desc_en: Human-readable status text for this individual task.
tasks[].status_message.title_zh: 该单个任务状态码对应的可读文本。

tasks[].cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks[].cost.title_zh: 该单个任务按美元计的费用。

tasks[].result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks[].result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

id.desc_en: Identifier (UUID) of the previously posted task whose results you want to retrieve.
id.title_zh: 此前提交、要获取其结果的任务的标识（UUID）。

version.desc_en: Version of the DataForSEO API that produced this response, e.g. `0.1.20240101`. Handy for reproducibility and support tickets.

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole response. `20000` means the call succeeded; any other value signals a request-level failure (auth, quota, malformed payload) — see `status_message`.

time.desc_en: Total server-side processing time for the response, as a duration string such as `0.1234 sec`.

tasks_error.title_zh: 以错误结束的任务数量，`0` 表示全部任务成功。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name to target, e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`. Provide either `location_name`, `location_code` or `location_coordinate`.
location_name.title_zh: 要定位的完整地区名称，如 `London,England,United Kingdom`。`location_name`、`location_code`、`location_coordinate` 三者择一。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates to target, formatted as `latitude,longitude` (optionally with radius). Alternative to `location_name`/`location_code`.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 以 `纬度,经度`（可附半径）格式给出的 GPS 坐标定位，替代 `location_name`/`location_code`。

language_code.desc_en: Language code to use, e.g. `en`; obtainable from the matching `.../languages` endpoint. Provide either `language_name` or `language_code`.
language_code.title_zh: 要使用的语言码，如 `en`，可从对应的 `.../languages` 接口获取。与 `language_name` 二选一。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name to use, e.g. `English`. Provide either `language_name` or `language_code`.
language_name.title_zh: 要使用的完整语言名称，如 `English`。与 `language_code` 二选一。

device.desc_en: Device the SERP is emulated on, typically `desktop` or `mobile`.

location_name.title_zh: 要定位的完整地区名称，如 `London,England,United Kingdom`。`location_name`、`location_code`、`location_coordinate` 三者择一。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code to target; obtainable from the matching `.../locations` endpoint. Provide either `location_name`, `location_code` or `location_coordinate`.
location_code.title_zh: 要定位的数字位置码，可从对应的 `.../locations` 接口获取。与 `location_name`、`location_coordinate` 三者择一。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name to use, e.g. `English`. Provide either `language_name` or `language_code`.
language_name.title_zh: 要使用的完整语言名称，如 `English`。与 `language_code` 二选一。

language_code.desc_en: Language code to use, e.g. `en`; obtainable from the matching `.../languages` endpoint. Provide either `language_name` or `language_code`.
language_code.title_zh: 要使用的语言码，如 `en`，可从对应的 `.../languages` 接口获取。与 `language_name` 二选一。

priority.desc_en: Task execution priority that controls how quickly the task is picked up for processing; higher priority is handled sooner and may cost more.
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级，决定任务被调度处理的快慢；优先级越高越早处理，费用也可能更高。

postback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO POSTs the completed task results to, removing the need to poll.
postback_url.title_zh: DataForSEO 在任务完成后将结果 POST 到的你方端点，可免去主动轮询。

pingback_url.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO notifies (pings) when the task completes, so you can then fetch results.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时 DataForSEO 通知（ping）的你方端点，收到后再去拉取结果。

postback_data.desc_en: Result format delivered to `postback_url`, selecting which payload variant (e.g. `regular`, `advanced`, `html`) is sent.
postback_data.title_zh: 投递到 `postback_url` 的结果格式，用于选择发送的结果变体（如 `regular`、`advanced`、`html`）。

version.desc_en: Version of the DataForSEO API that produced this response, e.g. `0.1.20240101`. Handy for reproducibility and support tickets.
version.title_zh: 生成本次响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `0.1.20240101`，便于复现与提交工单。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole response. `20000` means the call succeeded; any other value signals a request-level failure (auth, quota, malformed payload) — see `status_message`.
status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的总体状态码。`20000` 表示调用成功；其它值表示请求级失败（鉴权、配额、报文格式等），详情见 `status_message`。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable text for `status_code`: `Ok.` on success, or the failure reason otherwise.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读文本，成功为 `Ok.`，否则为失败原因。

time.desc_en: Total server-side processing time for the response, as a duration string such as `0.1234 sec`.
time.title_zh: 服务端处理本次响应的总耗时，形如 `0.1234 sec` 的时长字符串。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this request in USD, aggregated over all tasks in the response.
cost.title_zh: 本次请求按美元计的总费用，为响应内全部任务费用之和。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the `tasks` array.
tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的任务对象数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks that finished with an error; `0` means all tasks succeeded.
tasks_error.title_zh: 以错误结束的任务数量，`0` 表示全部任务成功。

tasks.desc_en: Container array holding one object per task, each carrying its own status and `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务容器数组，每个元素对应一个任务，内含各自的状态与 `result` 数据。

tasks[].id.desc_en: Unique task identifier (UUID). Pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to download the completed result.
tasks[].id.title_zh: 任务唯一标识（UUID）。传给对应的 `task_get` 接口即可下载已完成的结果。

tasks[].status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task; `20000` means the task itself succeeded.
tasks[].status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，`20000` 表示该任务自身成功。

tasks[].status_message.desc_en: Human-readable status text for this individual task.
tasks[].status_message.title_zh: 该单个任务状态码对应的可读文本。

tasks[].cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks[].cost.title_zh: 该单个任务按美元计的费用。

tasks[].result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks[].result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

keyword.desc_en: Search query string to run against Google.
keyword.title_zh: 要在 Google 上执行的查询关键词。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name to target, e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`. Provide either `location_name`, `location_code` or `location_coordinate`.
location_name.title_zh: 要定位的完整地区名称，如 `London,England,United Kingdom`。`location_name`、`location_code`、`location_coordinate` 三者择一。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code to target; obtainable from the matching `.../locations` endpoint. Provide either `location_name`, `location_code` or `location_coordinate`.
location_code.title_zh: 要定位的数字位置码，可从对应的 `.../locations` 接口获取。与 `location_name`、`location_coordinate` 三者择一。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name to use, e.g. `English`. Provide either `language_name` or `language_code`.
language_name.title_zh: 要使用的完整语言名称，如 `English`。与 `language_code` 二选一。

language_code.desc_en: Language code to use, e.g. `en`; obtainable from the matching `.../languages` endpoint. Provide either `language_name` or `language_code`.
language_code.title_zh: 要使用的语言码，如 `en`，可从对应的 `.../languages` 接口获取。与 `language_name` 二选一。

version.desc_en: Version of the DataForSEO API that produced this response, e.g. `0.1.20240101`. Handy for reproducibility and support tickets.
version.title_zh: 生成本次响应的 DataForSEO API 版本号，如 `0.1.20240101`，便于复现与提交工单。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole response. `20000` means the call succeeded; any other value signals a request-level failure (auth, quota, malformed payload) — see `status_message`.
status_code.title_zh: 整个响应的总体状态码。`20000` 表示调用成功；其它值表示请求级失败（鉴权、配额、报文格式等），详情见 `status_message`。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable text for `status_code`: `Ok.` on success, or the failure reason otherwise.
status_message.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读文本，成功为 `Ok.`，否则为失败原因。

time.desc_en: Total server-side processing time for the response, as a duration string such as `0.1234 sec`.
time.title_zh: 服务端处理本次响应的总耗时，形如 `0.1234 sec` 的时长字符串。

cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for this request in USD, aggregated over all tasks in the response.
cost.title_zh: 本次请求按美元计的总费用，为响应内全部任务费用之和。

tasks.desc_en: Container array holding one object per task, each carrying its own status and `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务容器数组，每个元素对应一个任务，内含各自的状态与 `result` 数据。

tasks[].result.desc_en: Result payload array for this task; element shape depends on the endpoint (SERP items, task references, locations, languages, etc.).
tasks[].result.title_zh: 该任务的结果数组，元素结构随接口而异（SERP 条目、任务引用、地区、语言等）。
